title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 191.1104
text:
*191.1104.  Display of license or certificate, how satisfied. — With regard to a person who voluntarily provides health care services and who is covered by the provisions of subsection 1 of section 191.1102, all requirements regarding display of a license or certificate shall be satisfied by the presentation for inspection, upon request, of a photocopy of the applicable license, certificate, or statement of exemption.
(L. 2013 S.B. 129) 
*Effective 10-11-13, see § 21.250.  S.B. 129 was vetoed July 3, 2013. The veto was overridden on September 11, 2013.
